children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The park shall be administered by the Secretary in accordance with this subchapter and with laws generally applicable to units of the National Park System, including the Act of (; et seq.) and the Act of (; et seq.).August 25, 1916August 21, 193539 Stat. 53516 U.S.C. 1149 Stat. 66616 U.S.C. 4611See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: b Management plan
children.text: Not later than 3 years after funds are made available for this purpose, the Secretary shall prepare an amendment to the General Management Plan for Fort Clatsop National Memorial to guide the management of the park.

children.heading: Cooperative management
children.label: c Cooperative management
children.text: In order to facilitate the presentation of a comprehensive picture of the Lewis and Clark Expedition’s experiences in the lower Columbia River area and to promote more efficient administration of the sites associated with those experiences, the Secretary may enter into cooperative management agreements with appropriate officials in the States of Washington and Oregon in accordance with the authority provided under .section 101703 of title 54
